name: utility-portfolio
description: Portfolio of free client-side web utilities. Tool #1: state paycheck calculators.

scripts.test: node scripts/test-engine.js && node scripts/test-canvas.js && node scripts/test-age.js && node scripts/test-tip.js && node scripts/test-text-stats.js && node scripts/check-freshness.js
scripts.dev: npm run build && npx --yes serve dist
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx --yes wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=tools-cherry
